raw_request: Provide the authoritative bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9, including the underlying bot-adjusted retained-user and denominator counts if available.
intent: Bot-adjusted 30-day retention is a controlling release criterion, whereas the visible raw retention is not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention window, bot-adjusted metric only.
expected_value_basis: A verified rate below 10% would rule out release; a rate at or above 10% would satisfy one of the two required release conditions and make eligible sample size the remaining controlling question.
